title: Whole-Genome DNA Extractions for MinION Sequencing Using the Macherey-Nagel NucleoBond HMW DNA Kit
author: Stephanie Le Prieur
materials: Discard the flow-through and the column filter.
Quality control using Nanodrop, Qubit and agarose gels.

steps.title: Grow strains on Petri dishes with...
steps.instruction: Grow strains on Petri dishes with PDA medium for 4 days at 20 °C.

steps.title: Scrape the plates and place them...
steps.instruction: Scrape the plates and place them into 2 mL Eppendorf tubes, store at –80 °C for at least 24 h, then lyophilize for 2 days (opened tube and sealed with pierced parafilm).

steps.title: Grind lyophilized mycelium using the Retsch...
steps.instruction: Grind lyophilized mycelium using the Retsch grinder and metal beads for 40 sec × 2 at 30 Hz. The powder should be fine.

steps.title: Weigh out 250 mg of dried mycelium for DNA extraction
steps.instruction: Weigh out 250 mg of dried mycelium for DNA extraction.

steps.title: Add 900 µL of lysis buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 900 µL of lysis buffer H1 + 200 µL proteinase K to each sample.

steps.title: Vortex for 2 min
steps.instruction: Vortex for 2 min.

steps.title: Centrifuge for 2 min at 11,000 G
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 2 min at 11,000 G.

steps.title: Transfer sample to a 15 mL...
steps.instruction: Transfer sample to a 15 mL tube and add 4 mL of buffer H1.

steps.title: Aliquot the sample into three 2...
steps.instruction: Aliquot the sample into three 2 mL microtubes, then vortex for 5 sec.

steps.title: Incubate samples at 50 °C for 30 min
steps.instruction: Incubate samples at 50 °C for 30 min.

steps.title: Combine the aliquots back into one...
steps.instruction: Combine the aliquots back into one new 15 mL polypropylene, conical centrifuge tube and add 100 µL RNase A. Mix gently by inverting the tube and incubate for 5 min at room temperature.

steps.title: Place the NucleoBond HMW column on...
steps.instruction: Place the NucleoBond HMW column on a 50 mL tube using the plastic rings from the manufacturer. Equilibrate with 12 mL buffer H2 by pouring along the sides of the filter (not at the center!). Let it drain by gravity.

steps.title: Add 10 mL buffer H2 to...
steps.instruction: Add 10 mL buffer H2 to each sample tube and mix gently by inversion.

steps.title: Load the sample onto the center...
steps.instruction: Load the sample onto the center of the column and let it flow through by gravity.

steps.title: Add 6 mL buffer H3 to...
steps.instruction: Add 6 mL buffer H3 to the column (along the sides!), let it flow through.

steps.title: Wash the column (without filter) with 12 mL buffer H4
steps.instruction: Wash the column (without filter) with 12 mL buffer H4.

steps.title: Place the column on new 50...
steps.instruction: Place the column on new 50 mL tubes for DNA elution. Add 5 mL of elution buffer H5.

steps.title: Precipitate the DNA by adding 3
steps.instruction: Precipitate the DNA by adding 3.5 mL isopropanol to each eluate. Mix gently by inversion 10 times (a DNA pellet should appear).

steps.title: Centrifuge for 10 min at 4,500 g
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 10 min at 4,500 g.

steps.title: Carefully discard the supernatant by pipetting...
steps.instruction: Carefully discard the supernatant by pipetting without losing the DNA pellet.

steps.title: Add 2 mL of 70% ethanol...
steps.instruction: Add 2 mL of 70% ethanol (0,22uM filter-sterilized) to each DNA pellet.

steps.title: Centrifuge for 5 min at 4,500 g
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 5 min at 4,500 g.

steps.title: Dry the pellet at room temperature...
steps.instruction: Dry the pellet at room temperature (ensure no ethanol remains, but do not over-dry as it will make resuspension difficult).

steps.title: Resuspend the DNA in 150 µL...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the DNA in 150 µL HE buffer by flicking the tube or gently pipetting the pellet (use wide-bore tips!).

steps.title: Transfer the DNA to a 1
steps.instruction: Transfer the DNA to a 1.5 mL microtube. If the liquid is still cloudy, add 50–100 µL (or more) HE buffer.
